note_en: Predictions are my (Fable 5 Max) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from FanDuel/DraftKings/bet365 (7 Jul); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Fable 5 Max）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：FanDuel/DraftKings/bet365（7 月 7 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward, continuing through the knockout rounds. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对预测胜负计分，并延续至淘汰赛阶段，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

log.label_zh: 阿根廷 3-2 佛得角（加时）

champions.reason_en: Ground past Paraguay 1-0 in R16 on a Mbappé penalty — not pretty, but job done against a defensive block. QF vs Morocco, July 9 Foxborough. Still the team to beat.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强靠姆巴佩点球 1-0 险胜巴拉圭密集防守——不够华丽，但顺利过关。八强 7 月 9 日战摩洛哥，福克斯堡。仍是夺冠头号热门。

champions.reason_en: Nipped past Portugal 1-0 in the R16 on a 91st-minute Mikel Merino winner, ending Ronaldo's international career — still yet to concede all tournament. QF vs Belgium, July 10 Los Angeles, after the Red Devils blitzed the USA 4-1.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强靠梅里诺第 91 分钟绝杀 1-0 险胜葡萄牙，终结 C 罗的国家队生涯——本届赛事仍未失球。八强 7 月 10 日战比利时，洛杉矶，此前红魔 4-1 血洗美国。

champions.reason_en: Survived a huge scare against Cape Verde, winning 3-2 in extra time via a deflected Romero effort, after being pegged back twice. Perfect group form (9 pts) still the headline, but the knockout nerves were visible. R16 vs Egypt, July 7 Atlanta — first-ever meeting, heavy favourites.
champions.reason_zh: 惊险过关，两度被佛得角追平后，靠罗梅罗一次射门经防守球员折射入网，加时3-2险胜。小组赛仍为全胜（9分），但淘汰赛的紧张感已显现。16强7月7日战埃及，亚特兰大，两队历史首次交手，阿根廷仍占大热。

champions.reason_en: Thumped Canada 3-0 in R16 (Ounahi brace, Rahimi) — comfortable, statement win. QF vs France, July 9 Foxborough, second straight WC quarter-final. The Atlas Lions are a genuine dark horse.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强 3-0 大胜加拿大（乌纳希梅开二度、拉希米建功）——轻松取胜，极具说服力。八强 7 月 9 日战法国，福克斯堡，连续两届杀入八强。阿特拉斯雄狮是真正的黑马。

champions.reason_en: Thrashed co-host USA 4-1 in a dominant R16 display — De Ketelaere's brace and a Lukaku stoppage-time strike showed real firepower. QF vs Spain, July 10 Los Angeles — a huge step up in class against the tournament's only side yet to concede.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强 4-1 痛击东道主美国，德凯特莱雷梅开二度、卢卡库补时建功，锋线火力尽显。八强 7 月 10 日战西班牙，洛杉矶——对手是本届唯一尚未失球的球队，难度陡增。

champions.reason_en: Stunned five-time champions Brazil 2-1 in R16 on a Haaland brace, reaching the quarter-finals for the first time in 28 years. QF vs England, July 11 Miami. The tournament's biggest surprise package now has a real shot.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强靠哈兰德梅开二度 2-1 爆冷淘汰五届冠军巴西，28 年来首次挺进八强。八强 7 月 11 日战英格兰，迈阿密。本届杯赛最大黑马，如今真有一战之力。

champions.reason_en: Survived Mexico 3-2 in a wild R16 (Bellingham brace, Kane penalty) despite playing 40+ minutes with ten men after a red card. QF vs Norway, July 11 Miami — Haaland looms as the biggest threat yet.
champions.reason_zh: 16 强 3-2 险胜墨西哥（贝林厄姆梅开二度、凯恩点球破门），红牌后十人应战超过 40 分钟仍挺住。八强 7 月 11 日战挪威，迈阿密——哈兰德将是迄今最大威胁。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Cool penalty winner vs Paraguay in R16 — still leading the Golden Boot race alongside Haaland. QF vs Morocco next. If France go deep, the tally will climb fast.
players.reason_zh: 16 强战巴拉圭主罚点球，沉着破门——继续与哈兰德并列金靴领跑。八强迎战摩洛哥。若法国走远，进球数将急速攀升。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Argentina survived Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time in R32; Messi remains the emotional and tactical focal point in what he's called his final World Cup. R16 vs Egypt, July 7 Atlanta. Eyes both Golden Boot and the trophy.
players.reason_zh: 阿根廷 32 强加时 3-2 险胜佛得角；梅西在自己所说的谢幕之战中仍是球队情感与战术核心。16 强 7 月 7 日战埃及，亚特兰大。金靴与冠军皆在视野中。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Brace in Norway's 2-1 R16 shock over Brazil — 7 goals this tournament, tied for the Golden Boot lead. QF vs England, July 11 Miami. The form player of the knockouts.
players.reason_zh: 16 强 2-1 爆冷淘汰巴西中梅开二度——本届合计 7 球，并列金靴榜首。八强 7 月 11 日战英格兰，迈阿密。淘汰赛阶段状态最佳的球员。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain squeezed past Portugal 1-0 in the R16 on a stoppage-time Merino winner; Yamal's dribbling out wide kept the pressure on all game. QF vs Belgium, July 10, Los Angeles — a much more direct, physical test than Portugal.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙 16 强靠补时阶段梅里诺绝杀 1-0 险胜葡萄牙，亚马尔边路突破持续制造威胁。八强 7 月 10 日战比利时，洛杉矶——对手风格更直接、更具身体对抗性，考验升级。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Scored a cool Panenka in the shootout to send Egypt past Australia and into a first Round of 16 since 1934. R16 vs Argentina, July 7 Atlanta — a tough draw, but Salah is playing with total belief right now.
players.reason_zh: 点球大战中以一记优雅的“熊猫式”点球帮助埃及淘汰澳大利亚，自1934年以来首次打入16强。16强7月7日战阿根廷，亚特兰大，对手很强，但萨拉赫现下信心十足。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: Penalty in England's 3-2 R16 win over Mexico, played through 40+ minutes down to ten men — keeps his Golden Boot chase alive alongside Mbappé, Messi and Haaland. QF vs Norway, July 11 Miami.
players.reason_zh: 16 强 3-2 险胜墨西哥中主罚点球破门，十人应战超过 40 分钟——金靴之争与姆巴佩、梅西、哈兰德持续升温。八强 7 月 11 日战挪威，迈阿密。

fixtures.reason_en: First-ever World Cup meeting between these sides. Argentina's group-stage dominance (9 pts, +7 GD) outweighs the extra-time scare against Cape Verde — Messi, in what he's signalled is his final World Cup, remains locked in with goals in every match. Egypt's historic run (first Round of 16 since 1934) leans on Salah's brilliance and defensive discipline, but the class gap with the reigning champions is significant. Argentina to progress toward a mouth-watering quarter-final with the Switzerland/Colombia winner.
fixtures.reason_zh: 两队世界杯历史首次交手。阿根廷小组赛的统治级表现（9分，净胜球+7）足以弥补对佛得角加时赛的惊魂一刻——梅西在自己宣布的谢幕之战中已场场进球，状态正佳。埃及历史性晋级16强（自1934年以来首次）将依靠萨拉赫的个人能力与防守纪律，但与卫冕冠军的实力差距明显。阿根廷有望晋级，八强将迎来瑞士/哥伦比亚胜者的诱人对决。

fixtures.reason_en: Only the second World Cup meeting ever between these sides. Both arrive unbeaten in 90 minutes this tournament — Switzerland edged Algeria 2-0, Colombia ground out Ghana 1-0. Díaz and Rodríguez give Colombia's attack a sharper cutting edge than Switzerland's efficient but less explosive setup. Winner gets a quarter-final against Argentina or Egypt.
fixtures.reason_zh: 两队世界杯历史上第二次交手。双方本届常规时间均未尝败绩——瑞士2-0胜阿尔及利亚，哥伦比亚1-0险胜加纳。迪亚斯与罗德里格斯让哥伦比亚的攻击线比高效但缺乏爆发力的瑞士更具威胁。胜者将晋级八强战阿根廷或埃及。

fixtures.reason_en: First of the quarter-finals to kick off. France ground past Paraguay 1-0 on a Mbappé penalty, while Morocco thumped Canada 3-0 to reach a second straight WC quarter-final. France's greater squad depth and knockout pedigree make them clear favourites, but Morocco's disciplined defensive block and dark-horse run mean this won't be routine.
fixtures.reason_zh: 首场八强战。法国靠姆巴佩点球 1-0 险胜巴拉圭，摩洛哥则 3-0 大胜加拿大，连续两届杀入八强。法国阵容深度与淘汰赛经验更胜一筹，稳居热门，但摩洛哥防守纪律严明且延续黑马之势，此役绝非轻松过关。

fixtures.reason_en: Spain haven't conceded all tournament and needed a 91st-minute Merino winner to see off Portugal; Belgium arrive full of confidence after blitzing the USA 4-1 with De Ketelaere leading the line. Spain's control and Yamal's return give them the edge, but Belgium's cutting edge on the counter is the biggest threat to that clean sheet.
fixtures.reason_zh: 西班牙本届赛事尚未失球，但也要靠梅里诺第 91 分钟绝杀才险胜葡萄牙；比利时以德凯特莱雷领衔 4-1 血洗美国，士气正盛。西班牙的控场能力与亚马尔的回归占优，但比利时的反击效率是零封纪录最大的威胁。
